# Enterprise Cloud Security Guardrails

This project demonstrates how I implemented cloud security guardrails using Terraform, AWS, and DevSecOps practices. The goal was to enforce secure infrastructure configurations and automate security checks within a CI/CD pipeline.

## Technologies
- Terraform
- AWS (S3, CloudWatch)
- GitHub Actions
- DevSecOps security automation

## Security Controls
- S3 Public Access Block
- Server-Side Encryption
- Bucket Versioning
- CloudWatch Monitorings
- Infrastructure as Code validation

## Project Purpose
This project showcased my practical DevSecOps and Cloud Security engineering skills including my understanding for infrastructure automation, security guardrails, and CI/CD integration.
